summary: Tested Admin Codes & Redemptions extension for 6 internal DEMO codes + 2 BETADOLLAR $1-test codes. Backend pytest: 9/9 passed (seed idempotency, list/demo, list/test, auto-expire-on-read, /batches scoping with total_batches=136, override REVOKE+RESTORE). Frontend Playwright: all tabs render, demo/test tables show correct rows with expected data, seed button shows '0 inserted, 8 refreshed', override dialog flips DEMOSOFU55 to REVOKED then restored to ACTIVE.

issues: React 'Encountered two children with the same key' warnings in console for batch codes (e.g. B10-01-DIG, B25-01-PHY, etc.) — list rendering uses non-unique keys when same sequence appears in multiple sub-batches. Pre-existing, not in scope of this iteration but should be cleaned up. Use composite key (batch_id+code) instead of just code.
Radix DialogContent missing aria-describedby/Description warning — minor a11y improvement.

critical_code_review_comments: Auto-expire sweep runs on every /batches and /list call — efficient via single update_many; good design.
_build_demo_doc/_build_test_doc preserve uses_used and status on refresh (only static rules are updated) — correct idempotency semantics.
DEMO-INTERNAL and TEST-DOLLAR are excluded from /batches via match on code_type in {batch, missing, null} — verified scoping holds (total_batches=136).

Existing React key warnings on batch code listing (B10-01-DIG etc.) are not from this iteration but should be addressed — multiple rows with same 'code' value across different batches likely cause it.
POST /seed-demo-test should consider returning 201 on first creation vs 200 on refresh — currently 200 always (acceptable but not REST-strict).
test_credentials: Admin: overflowharvest@gmail.com / Admin123! — used 'Continue without 2FA' on /2fa-setup
seed_data_creation: POST /api/admin/codes-redemptions/seed-demo-test inserted/refreshed 6 demo codes (DEMOSOFU79/77/80/97/60/55) and 2 test codes (BETADOLLAR79/97). DEMOSOFU55 was toggled REVOKED then restored to ACTIVE. BETADOLLAR79 expires_at temporarily set to past for auto-expire test, then restored to 2026-04-29T03:59:00Z ACTIVE.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 verified the demo/test code admin endpoints + UI. State at end: all 6 demo codes ACTIVE 0/5 uses, both BETADOLLAR codes ACTIVE 0/∞ uses with expires_at=2026-04-29T03:59:00Z. /batches total_batches=136 unchanged and excludes DEMO-INTERNAL/TEST-DOLLAR. Pre-existing React key warnings on batch list view exist but are out of scope. Phase 2 user-side redemption was NOT tested (out of scope per request).
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures in this iteration.
